seoContent.title: Find OEM factories in Thailand with NEOEM
seoContent.description: NEOEM is built for founders and brands that need a faster way to find OEM factories, compare manufacturers, and start production with more confidence.

highlights.verifiedDesc: Browse factory profiles with specialties, certifications, and trust signals before you request a quote.
highlights.matchDesc: Find skincare, cosmetics, supplements, packaging, and other OEM partners that match your production needs.
highlights.launchDesc: Use built-in contract, compliance, and launch tools while sourcing the right manufacturer.

seoContent.editorialQuote: The fastest way to reduce sourcing risk is to compare real factory fit before you start talking price.

takeaways.one: Start with verified OEM factories, not random directories.
takeaways.two: Compare MOQ, specialties, and trust signals before outreach.
takeaways.three: Use category-specific pages to narrow your shortlist faster.

seoContent.faqTitle: Questions brands ask before choosing an OEM factory

faq.q1: How does NEOEM help me find an OEM factory?
faq.a1: NEOEM helps you search verified factory profiles, compare specialties, MOQ, certifications, and shortlist manufacturers that fit your product and budget.
faq.q2: Can I search OEM factories in Thailand by product category?
faq.a2: Yes. You can explore factories for cosmetics, skincare, supplements, packaging, clothing, food, and other manufacturing categories.
faq.q3: Why use NEOEM instead of searching factories manually?
faq.a3: NEOEM combines factory discovery, trust verification, quotation workflows, and legal support in one place, so brands can move faster and reduce sourcing risk.

tosModal.title: Terms of Service
tosModal.description: Please review and accept our platform terms before starting negotiations.
tosModal.tradeSecretsDesc: By using NEOEM's messaging platform, you agree to protect all trade secrets, formulations, pricing information, and business strategies shared during negotiations.
tosModal.confidentialityDesc: All information exchanged through this platform is confidential and shall not be disclosed to third parties without written consent.
tosModal.platformRulesDesc: Users must conduct business in good faith and not use information gained through negotiations to circumvent the platform.
tosModal.agree: I agree to NEOEM's Terms of Service & NDA Policy regarding trade secrets protection
